headline: This ETF Was Built to Capture the Market’s Big Shifts. Where It Is Headed Now.
summary: The  has won a big following among investors with an ambitious promise: Beat the market by capitalizing on shifts in sentiment between factors such as growth, value, and quality.  After years of favoring almost exclusively tech stocks connected to artificial intelligence, investors suddenly can’t get enough of hard-hat sectors such as energy, materials, and industrials.  Over the past six months, the fund—often referred to by its ticker DYNF—has delivered a cumulative total return of 6.1%, according to  FactSet  slightly better than the S&P 500’s 5.7% return.

Over the past six months, the fund—often referred to by its ticker DYNF—has delivered a cumulative total return of 6.1%, according to  FactSet  slightly better than the S&P 500’s 5.7% return.

headline: Supply Chain Control Enables Apple to Launch Lower-Priced Notebooks Amid Industry Downturn to Fill Pricing Gap, Says TrendForce
summary: TrendForce's latest projections estimate that global notebook shipments will decline 9.2% YoY in 2026, with the possibility of deeper contraction should demand remain weak. Amid simultaneous shortages and price increases in memory and CPUs—factors prompting most notebook brands to streamline product lines and adopt cautious inventory strategies—Apple has taken the opposite approach by introducing an entry-level notebook, the MacBook Neo, at a starting price of US$599.

headline: Gemini Lawsuit And Apple Deal Reframe Alphabet’s AI Risk And Reward
summary: Alphabet (NasdaqGS:GOOGL) is facing a landmark wrongful death lawsuit alleging its Gemini chatbot contributed to an individual's suicide. The case is described as the first of its kind involving a major consumer AI product and raises new legal and ethical questions for AI developers. Separately, Apple and Alphabet have agreed a multi year collaboration that will see Google's Gemini models and cloud services support Siri. The partnership positions Google's AI and cloud stack at the core of a...
